use_cases: Separating navigation links in header menus between primary and secondary items
Dividing sections in dropdown or flyout menus
Creating visual breaks in toolbar or action bars
Dividing content sections in forms or settings pages
ai_summary: A lightweight Base UI Separator component that renders a thin vertical or horizontal line to visually divide navigation elements. Primarily used in header navigation bars to separate primary nav items (Home, Pricing, Blog) from secondary actions (Log in). Features keyboard accessibility with focus-visible states and supports vertical/horizontal orientations.
